style: Graphic-novel illustration, bold inked linework, cel-shaded flats with hard shadow edges, limited palette of deep violet, dark cyan and cold black, dramatic single key light. Painterly sci-fi comic panel. No text, no speech bubbles, no captions, no lettering, no borders, no panel gutters.

images.scene: Silent wreck of a small freighter tumbling in deep space, no fire left — just cold metal and stars. Bodies of cargo containers drifting apart. Haunting, quiet, cinematic 16:9 background. Dark blue-black space palette, painterly style — the emotional aftermath, not the explosion.
